taxonomy: Acinodendron metallicum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the genus Acinodendron, which is native to Brazil. The classification of this plant is further supported by its botanical name, which includes its genus and species. The family Melastomataceae is a group of plants commonly known as the melastome family. This classification helps to organize and understand the relationships between different plant species.
